description: The Yamaken-gumi is a yakuza gang based in Kobe, Japan, founded in 1961 by Kenichi Yamamoto. It was the largest affiliate of the Yamaguchi-gumi until 2015, when it withdrew to form the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi. After a period of independence, it rejoined the Yamaguchi-gumi in 2021. The group has an estimated membership of around 800.
